With a measuring range of 0.05 to 30 m, a Class II laser (635 nm) and an accuracy of +/- 3 mm / 10 m, it provides accurate results for distance, area and volume measurements. The instrument is comfortable to use with easy-to-read results on the backlit LCD display and soft grip surfaces that provide a secure grip.
